blended.narrative: Wisp is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 32°F.
